# Calculating acceleration formula

## Short Teaching Summary
Acceleration can be calculated using the formula a = F / m.

## Difficulty
0.25

## Prerequisites
- Push or pull action

## Related Concepts
- Push or pull action (requires)

## Misconceptions
- To calculate acceleration using F = ma, F must be the resultant force acting on the object.

## Best Examples
- None recorded.

## Best Analogy
- None recorded.
